title: **4. ::FLOAT1NG.P01NTS**
content:
**4. ::FLOAT1NG.P01NTS**
- Visual + Motion Design Project
- Experimental video, projection mapping, gallery/museum potential
- May evolve into 3D, environmental installations

**5. ::ETCETER4**
- Audio ID — Experimental Pop, Sound Design
- Personal music project within broader label
- Live performance, recording, experimental audio systems

**Label Shell:**
**::ET4L (Etceter4 + LoCreance + Future Collabs/Artists)**
- Home for musical & cross-disciplinary artists
- Distribution, production, modular collaboration hub
- Houses: LOCREANCE, ETCETER4, guest creators, remix projects

---

### IV. Tech & Tools: System Interfaces

**1. ::KONS0L / ANN.ARKIV**
- Research archive, knowledge bank, citations, version tracking
